circular_title: CBDT Circular: TDS Rate Revision - FY 2026-27
circular_summary: TDS rates revised for Section 194C and 194J effective April 2026.
actions: Update ERP or payroll-accounting systems to apply the revised TDS rates from the first payment cycle after implementation

Verify PAN availability, threshold limits, and the nature of payment before deciding the applicable section and rate for contractual payments under Section 194C and professional or technical fee payments under Section 194J
email_subject: Compliance Advisory: CBDT Circular: TDS Rate Revision - FY 2026-27
email_body:
{
  "subject": "Compliance Advisory: CBDT Circular on TDS Rate Revision for FY 2026-27",
  "body": "Dear Sunita Rao,

As a Non-Banking Financial Company (NBFC), Sunrise Finserv NBFC Ltd. is required to deduct tax at source (TDS) on payments made to contractors, professionals, and other third parties. The recent CBDT Circular: TDS Rate Revision - FY 2026-27 necessitates updates to your tax compliance procedures.

To ensure compliance, please take the following actions:

1. Update your Enterprise Resource Planning (ERP) or payroll-accounting systems to apply the revised TDS rates from the first payment cycle after implementation.
2. Verify PAN availability, threshold limits, and the nature of payment before deciding the applicable section and rate for contractual payments under Section 194C and professional or technical fee payments under Section 194J.

Please note that the deadline for these actions is **2026-04-26**. Failure to comply may result in penalties, although the circular does not specify the exact amount.

If you require assistance with updating your systems or verifying PAN details, please do not hesitate to contact us. We are here to support you in maintaining tax compliance.

Best regards,
Compliance Advisory Team"
}
internal_notes: CA notes — deadline was estimated, cross-checks needed for correct implementation of revised TDS rates
